---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for Summ-AI-rize
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm frustrated when..."

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered
Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context
Mockups, links, references, anything that helps explain the idea.
